S.FORM: == kabutulay, kabotolay ÁźÉŤē® == masadumaay a ngangan Nephrolepis auriculata Trimen (mitesekay a ngangan)Nephrolepis auriculata Trimen ŤďßŤē®ÁßĎ(Oleandraceae) (sapamataan a ngangan)Oleandraceae ŤÖéŤē®ŚĪ¨ (mikeliday tu ngangan)butul a langawan ŤÖéŤē®,ť≥≥ŚáįŤõč, (tada ngangan)butul, Feng-huang-dan, kiwma nu buwa', shan-jidan, ngipen nu sidi', Tie-jidan, kiwma nu buwa', Tiane-bao-dan, ti'kuk nu tikulac, Yan-jidan, da'dac, jade-fern, Yuan-yang-chi, Yuan-yang-chi, wugong-cao, Bi-zi-cao, Shi-huang-pi, Ye-jidan, Shi-dan-guo, She-dancan, Ma-liu-luan, butul, Shen-lin-jue, Ye-ming-tu-zhu, Shan-zhu-zai-luan-he, Er-ji-jia-shi-wei ŚłÉŤĺ≤ Mahazumu Tu Lili,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Kabotolay,ťĄí Tariri 'Iciuru,piwma Triyatriyaran, Amis Bu Dor Nu E Du,Lukay Kavuvuthuru (kamu nu binacadan)Bunun Mahazumu Tu Lili,Sakidaya Kabotolay,Co Tariri 'Iciuru,ŚćĎŚćó Triyatriyaran,ťėŅÁĺé Bu Dor Nu E Du,ť≠ĮŚáĪ Kavuvuthuru (mitaduay nu binacadan)Bunun, Sakidaya, Co, piwma, Amis, Lukay kaliwasak nu langaw tada Taywan nu langawan, hina adih kita i sasanu buyu a ba'ba'tuan atu lilis nu sawacan. Taywan nu subalan nu enal katukuh tu dadipasan a makaala tu tusaay a malebut a congcayy nu buyuan atu dadipasan nu likenlikenan. Lani' sanasay idaw ku nika liwasak nu langaw. sasapayuan isanek nu kakanen han, kala sicedaman, abesa', cupelak sapi', nai ku ledek, patahekal tu akuti' tangan nu udip, mihepec tu lebawa, sakacay u'hu'h, sakay ngaluh a kakanen. ...Á≠Č. sapingay tu imelang han, u u'hu'h, banic, buwa', gao-xieya, cucu', caay ka tahekal nu aisian, duka, sakaycebu, madingac, mata, kalatan nu alisalap, bangen, adada nu bili, huang-dan, lebawa nu cucu sa. milihida tu langaw mu sakamu Butul u gu-sui-bu-ke nu mihcaan nanay mikabitay tu lalana a lutukan nu langawan, talakaw nu langaw han makaala tu tulu a bataan idaw ku lima~ lima a bataan idaw ku lima a congfen, sasa' idaw ku mibalatay nu milaladay nu tapang mahida u tabakiay nu telayanm, pabaw idaw ku pinaay nu mahida u ti'kuk nu malian ku wayway a pangkiw nu hecian a butulan, belih nu papah idaw ku kalawlawan nu cunse a banuhan. papah masakaput namakalala' tu amulangaw, masadid ku papah mamulmul sinangipenan nu madicemay nu papahan, tanayu' han cacay ~ tulu a congfen, ahebal han 0.5 congfen, papah nu akaway tanayu' han makaala tu lima ~ pulu' a congfen, hekal nu papah nai ku banuh. maki mulmullay nu sasapalan itida i lilis nu labuan adidiay a sasulitan nu tunduh, mililis tu tebnay nu sasulitan idaw ku cacaya a caculilan nu papahan, idaw ku mamulmulay nu isasaay a papahan nu sasapalan . picidekan nu yadahay nu mihcaan nanay a lutukan nu langawan, lamit angangan aapuyu adidi, sasa nu lamit idsaw ku masa maliay nu angangan nu wayway, siheci. butul nu langawan han makaala tu tulu a bataan a congfenm, papah masabanuh kunika ilabu nuni ka celitan, madadecdec makubit, kala lumenian ku langdaw nu kulit, lamit han mahida u adidiay nu telay, manamuh i lidulidungan maudip, kapah palumaan i kabing sakay lumaan aadihan, . mangalay mibuwan tu butulan aw sasapalan ku sabulesak atu nipecaan a paluma', udip sananay cinida, anu namibuwahtu sa apina tu ku langaw mabuwahay, anu kapah ku lalangawan nu kakitidaan, mihmihcaan idawtu ku lalangaw. . butul han itini i malaysiya, faliubin,liuqiu atu Taywan hina adih kita tu langaw nu butul. kaliwasak nu langawan nida han i sasa nu kilakilanga lidulidungan, dadan, lilis nu cilicilisan, mihmihcaan idawtu ku aalan. . anumukan aw sasaay nu lamitan a masaheciay nu Malian, abihbihan mibanaw ku banuh, kapahtu kuni banawan sa semsemhan a mukan. silangaw siheci ku lamit nu butul tu mahidaay u mamulmulay nu angangan a hecian, mahida u linkin ku tabaki, paduh nu angangan nu heci u hese si banuh, u sakapahay nu tayda i hekal nu nananuman a langawan. nina lukuktan a langawan, u batul kumi cidekay nu silaculay nu hecian, ikanamuhan nida kasilangawan han, butu a langawan paadihhan kita matineng tu kita tu langaw nida. . ihekal hinaadih kita tu langaw nu butul, laklaksa asilangaw, papah nu butul han taneng sipahcek tuni sangaan numita tu baluan, u sakapahay nu kakapetan atu sakay salaam nu sasangaan, taneng a palumaan I kabing u sakapahay nu sakay luma' nu aadihan a langdaway nu langawan caaya kasi balu. . mukan tu heci nu butul han pasipasipen ku hese nu banuhan, usa semseman nu nananuman numita, amica kunika cepelakan, ihekal anunai ku nanum u butul nu heci ku alan numita aminanum, namukan tu butul han milawpes tu lebawa' atu ledek, yumahida miala kitatu mangaduay a papah pekpeken sipaduhepic i banges, tunika dingacan atu lebawa. tada kitidaan ÁÜĪŚł∂šļěśī≤,ťĚěśī≤ kacaledesan nu Yazhou, Feizhou sapihica tadamahicaay tu a nananuman nu langawan, sakay hekla nu sapicunus tu nananuman. mangaduay nu papah atu heci nubutul ku kakanen, heci nu butul a kakanen han u mangaduay nu papah atu mahidaay u heciyan, sakay ngaluh, mangalay, patahekal tu akuti' nu udip. 3. . sapahecek tu sasangan tu balu, u sakapahay nu sapahcekan nu sasangan, tada nagngan han u sidi nu ngipen. sasapayuan , hamin nu langaw ku sasapayuen. tatapangan . langaw nu butul u talakaw han makaala tu tulu a bataan a pina nu congfen, lamit tatapangan apuyu, masadit, sikines, tulu ku tatapangan nu langawan, apuyuay a tatapangan u papah nu akaway kumi tahabay. ŤĎ°ŚĆźŤéĖ, . milaladay ku tatapangan, iliyu' tu milalad, angangan yadah ku adidiay nu langawan, apuyuan ku langaw, sisa masakaput ku langaw nida, papah malecaday i batacan ku papah, masakapu a maudip, papah nu akaway tanayu han makaala tu enem ~tusa a bataan idaw ku lima a congfen, mangduay nu sapal han madadecdec ku langaw u belih han hese' nu sibanuhay a kinesan, kines han malecad ku kaku, macacelcel ku keliwan a wayway, papah nu angangan mabalat ku ilabuay nu sasulitan, pabaw nu belih sikines. ŤĎČÁČáťē∑ 25~65 ŚÖ¨ŚąÜ,ŚĮ¨ 2~6 ŚÖ¨ŚąÜ,ÁĺĹÁčÄŤ£ā, . tanayu nu papah han tusa a bataan idaw ku lima ~enem a bataan idaw ku limam a congfen, ahebal han makaala tu tusa ~ enem a congfen, macelitay nu banuhan, banuhan nai ku akaway nu papahan, teban nu akaway nu papahan sibatac, banuhan nu akawayan han makaala tu cacay ~sepat a congfen, ahebal han makaala tu ceci ~tusa a congfen, angangan han caay kalecad ku wayway, papah nu tangilaan masadicem, nika babelihan nu papaha masadit, sasa nu banuhan caay ka mulmul ku wayway, apuyu, pabawan nu banuhan yadah ku sasapalan numaupuay, tanayu' han makaala tu tulu ~sepat a cong, kala dicemdiceman, lilis nu papahan idaw ku masingangay a salualusan a adidiay nu ngangipenan nu papahan. balu heci nu sasapalan mapulung mamulmul, mikabit i teban nu papahn a nikudan nu lilisan, maupuay nu sasapalan pela'sa, mahida u buwa' ku wayway, sisa pangangan han tu butul. u siwkay nu nipaluma . u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika

¶aaj tu a nananuman nu r~…ĺaŇčawan, sakaj ńß…ôkr~…ĺa nu sapi ¶unus tu nananuman. maŇčaduaj nu papańß atu ńß…ô ¶i nubutur~…ĺ ku kakan…ôn, ńß…ô ¶i nu butur~…ĺ a kakan…ôn ńßan u maŇčaduaj nu papańß atu sidi nu Ňčip…ôn. sasapajuan , ńßamin nu r~…ĺaŇčaw ku sasapaju…ôn. tatapaŇčan . r~…ĺaŇčaw nu butur~…ĺ u tar~…ĺakaw ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺu a bataan a pina nu ¶oŇčf…ôn, r~…ĺamit tatapaŇčan apuju, ¶…ôr~…ĺ ku k…ôr~…ĺiwan a wajwaj, papańß nu aŇčaŇčan mabar~…ĺat ku ir~…ĺabuaj nu sasur~…ĺitan, pabaw nu b…ôr~…ĺińß sikin…ôs. *** **~** **,* *~* **,***, . tanaju nu papańß ńßan tusa a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima ~…ôn…ôm a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺimam a ¶oŇčf…ôn, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu tusa ~ …ôn…ôm a ¶oŇčf…ôn, ma ¶…ôr~…ĺitaj nu banuńßan, banuńßan nai ku akawaj nu papańßan, t…ôban nu akawaj nu papańßan sibata ¶, banuńßan nu akawajan ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj ~s…ôpat a ¶oŇčf…ôn, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶…ô ¶i ~tusa a ¶oŇčf…ôn, aŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku wajwaj, papańß nu taŇčir~…ĺaan masadi ¶…ôm, nika bab…ôr~…ĺińßan nu papańßa masadit, sasa nu banuńßan ¶aaj ka mur~…ĺmur~…ĺ ku wajwaj, apuju, pabawan nu banuńßan jadańß ku sasapar~…ĺan numaupuaj, tanaju Ē~ ° ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺu ~s…ôpat a ¶oŇč, kar~…ĺa di ¶…ômdi ¶…ôman, r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu papańßan idaw ku masiŇčaŇčaj a sar~…ĺuar~…ĺusan a adidiaj nu ŇčaŇčip…ônan nu papańßan. bar~…ĺu ńß…ô ¶i nu sasapar~…ĺan mapur~…ĺuŇč mamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, mikabit i t…ôban nu papańßn a nikudan nu r~…ĺir~…ĺisan, maupuaj nu sasapar~…ĺan p…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ °sa, mańßida u buwa Ē~ ° ku wajwaj, sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu butur~…ĺ. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma . u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika
S.FORM: == kabutulay, kabotolay ÁźÉŤē® == masadumaay a ngangan Nephrolepis auriculata Trimen (mitesekay a ngangan)Nephrolepis auriculata Trimen ŤďßŤē®ÁßĎ(Oleandraceae) (sapamataan a ngangan)Oleandraceae ŤÖéŤē®ŚĪ¨ (mikeliday tu ngangan)butul a langawan ŤÖéŤē®,ť≥≥ŚáįŤõč, (tada ngangan)butul, Feng-huang-dan, kiwma nu buwa', shan-jidan, ngipen nu sidi', Tie-jidan, kiwma nu buwa', Tiane-bao-dan, ti'kuk nu tikulac, Yan-jidan, da'dac, jade-fern, Yuan-yang-chi, Yuan-yang-chi, wugong-cao, Bi-zi-cao, Shi-huang-pi, Ye-jidan, Shi-dan-guo, She-dancan, Ma-liu-luan, butul, Shen-lin-jue, Ye-ming-tu-zhu, Shan-zhu-zai-luan-he, Er-ji-jia-shi-wei ŚłÉŤĺ≤ Mahazumu Tu Lili,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Kabotolay,ťĄí Tariri 'Iciuru,piwma Triyatriyaran, Amis Bu Dor Nu E Du,Lukay Kavuvuthuru (kamu nu binacadan)Bunun Mahazumu Tu Lili,Sakidaya Kabotolay,Co Tariri 'Iciuru,ŚćĎŚćó Triyatriyaran,ťėŅÁĺé Bu Dor Nu E Du,ť≠ĮŚáĪ Kavuvuthuru (mitaduay nu binacadan)Bunun, Sakidaya, Co, piwma, Amis, Lukay kaliwasak nu langaw tada Taywan nu langawan, hina adih kita i sasanu buyu a ba'ba'tuan atu lilis nu sawacan. Taywan nu subalan nu enal katukuh tu dadipasan a makaala tu tusaay a malebut a congcayy nu buyuan atu dadipasan nu likenlikenan. Lani' sanasay idaw ku nika liwasak nu langaw. sasapayuan isanek nu kakanen han, kala sicedaman, abesa', cupelak sapi', nai ku ledek, patahekal tu akuti' tangan nu udip, mihepec tu lebawa, sakacay u'hu'h, sakay ngaluh a kakanen. ...Á≠Č. sapingay tu imelang han, u u'hu'h, banic, buwa', gao-xieya, cucu', caay ka tahekal nu aisian, duka, sakaycebu, madingac, mata, kalatan nu alisalap, bangen, adada nu bili, huang-dan, lebawa nu cucu sa. milihida tu langaw mu sakamu Butul u gu-sui-bu-ke nu mihcaan nanay mikabitay tu lalana a lutukan nu langawan, talakaw nu langaw han makaala tu tulu a bataan idaw ku lima~ lima a bataan idaw ku lima a congfen, sasa' idaw ku mibalatay nu milaladay nu tapang mahida u tabakiay nu telayanm, pabaw idaw ku pinaay nu mahida u ti'kuk nu malian ku wayway a pangkiw nu hecian a butulan, belih nu papah idaw ku kalawlawan nu cunse a banuhan. papah masakaput namakalala' tu amulangaw, masadid ku papah mamulmul sinangipenan nu madicemay nu papahan, tanayu' han cacay ~ tulu a congfen, ahebal han 0.5 congfen, papah nu akaway tanayu' han makaala tu lima ~ pulu' a congfen, hekal nu papah nai ku banuh. maki mulmullay nu sasapalan itida i lilis nu labuan adidiay a sasulitan nu tunduh, mililis tu tebnay nu sasulitan idaw ku cacaya a caculilan nu papahan, idaw ku mamulmulay nu isasaay a papahan nu sasapalan . picidekan nu yadahay nu mihcaan nanay a lutukan nu langawan, lamit angangan aapuyu adidi, sasa nu lamit idsaw ku masa maliay nu angangan nu wayway, siheci. butul nu langawan han makaala tu tulu a bataan a congfenm, papah masabanuh kunika ilabu nuni ka celitan, madadecdec makubit, kala lumenian ku langdaw nu kulit, lamit han mahida u adidiay nu telay, manamuh i lidulidungan maudip, kapah palumaan i kabing sakay lumaan aadihan, . mangalay mibuwan tu butulan aw sasapalan ku sabulesak atu nipecaan a paluma', udip sananay cinida, anu namibuwahtu sa apina tu ku langaw mabuwahay, anu kapah ku lalangawan nu kakitidaan, mihmihcaan idawtu ku lalangaw. . butul han itini i malaysiya, faliubin,liuqiu atu Taywan hina adih kita tu langaw nu butul. kaliwasak nu langawan nida han i sasa nu kilakilanga lidulidungan, dadan, lilis nu cilicilisan, mihmihcaan idawtu ku aalan. . anumukan aw sasaay nu lamitan a masaheciay nu Malian, abihbihan mibanaw ku banuh, kapahtu kuni banawan sa semsemhan a mukan. silangaw siheci ku lamit nu butul tu mahidaay u mamulmulay nu angangan a hecian, mahida u linkin ku tabaki, paduh nu angangan nu heci u hese si banuh, u sakapahay nu tayda i hekal nu nananuman a langawan. nina lukuktan a langawan, u batul kumi cidekay nu silaculay nu hecian, ikanamuhan nida kasilangawan han, butu a langawan paadihhan kita matineng tu kita tu langaw nida. . ihekal hinaadih kita tu langaw nu butul, laklaksa asilangaw, papah nu butul han taneng sipahcek tuni sangaan numita tu baluan, u sakapahay nu kakapetan atu sakay salaam nu sasangaan, taneng a palumaan I kabing u sakapahay nu sakay luma' nu aadihan a langdaway nu langawan caaya kasi balu. . mukan tu heci nu butul han pasipasipen ku hese nu banuhan, usa semseman nu nananuman numita, amica kunika cepelakan, ihekal anunai ku nanum u butul nu heci ku alan numita aminanum, namukan tu butul han milawpes tu lebawa' atu ledek, yumahida miala kitatu mangaduay a papah pekpeken sipaduhepic i banges, tunika dingacan atu lebawa. tada kitidaan ÁÜĪŚł∂šļěśī≤,ťĚěśī≤ kacaledesan nu Yazhou, Feizhou sapihica tadamahicaay tu a nananuman nu langawan, sakay hekla nu sapicunus tu nananuman. mangaduay nu papah atu heci nubutul ku kakanen, heci nu butul a kakanen han u mangaduay nu papah atu mahidaay u heciyan, sakay ngaluh, mangalay, patahekal tu akuti' nu udip. 3. . sapahecek tu sasangan tu balu, u sakapahay nu sapahcekan nu sasangan, tada nagngan han u sidi nu ngipen. sasapayuan , hamin nu langaw ku sasapayuen. tatapangan . langaw nu butul u talakaw han makaala tu tulu a bataan a pina nu congfen, lamit tatapangan apuyu, masadit, sikines, tulu ku tatapangan nu langawan, apuyuay a tatapangan u papah nu akaway kumi tahabay. ŤĎ°ŚĆźŤéĖ, . milaladay ku tatapangan, iliyu' tu milalad, angangan yadah ku adidiay nu langawan, apuyuan ku langaw, sisa masakaput ku langaw nida, papah malecaday i batacan ku papah, masakapu a maudip, papah nu akaway tanayu han makaala tu enem ~tusa a bataan idaw ku lima a congfen, mangduay nu sapal han madadecdec ku langaw u belih han hese' nu sibanuhay a kinesan, kines han malecad ku kaku, macacelcel ku keliwan a wayway, papah nu angangan mabalat ku ilabuay nu sasulitan, pabaw nu belih sikines. ŤĎČÁČáťē∑ 25~65 ŚÖ¨ŚąÜ,ŚĮ¨ 2~6 ŚÖ¨ŚąÜ,ÁĺĹÁčÄŤ£ā, . tanayu nu papah han tusa a bataan idaw ku lima ~enem a bataan idaw ku limam a congfen, ahebal han makaala tu tusa ~ enem a congfen, macelitay nu banuhan, banuhan nai ku akaway nu papahan, teban nu akaway nu papahan sibatac, banuhan nu akawayan han makaala tu cacay ~sepat a congfen, ahebal han makaala tu ceci ~tusa a congfen, angangan han caay kalecad ku wayway, papah nu tangilaan masadicem, nika babelihan nu papaha masadit, sasa nu banuhan caay ka mulmul ku wayway, apuyu, pabawan nu banuhan yadah ku sasapalan numaupuay, tanayu' han makaala tu tulu ~sepat a cong, kala dicemdiceman, lilis nu papahan idaw ku masingangay a salualusan a adidiay nu ngangipenan nu papahan. balu heci nu sasapalan mapulung mamulmul, mikabit i teban nu papahn a nikudan nu lilisan, maupuay nu sasapalan pela'sa, mahida u buwa' ku wayway, sisa pangangan han tu butul. u siwkay nu nipaluma . u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika

¶…ôr~…ĺ ku k…ôr~…ĺiwan a wajwaj, papańß nu aŇčaŇčan mabar~…ĺat ku ir~…ĺabuaj nu sasur~…ĺitan, pabaw nu b…ôr~…ĺińß sikin…ôs. *** **~** **,* *~* **,***, . tanaju nu papańß ńßan tusa a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima ~…ôn…ôm a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺimam a ¶oŇčf…ôn, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu tusa ~ …ôn…ôm a ¶oŇčf…ôn, ma ¶…ôr~…ĺitaj nu banuńßan, banuńßan nai ku akawaj nu papańßan, t…ôban nu akawaj nu papańßan sibata ¶, banuńßan nu akawajan ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj ~s…ôpat a ¶oŇčf…ôn, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶…ô ¶i ~tusa a ¶oŇčf…ôn, aŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku wajwaj, papańß nu taŇčir~…ĺaan masadi ¶…ôm, nika bab…ôr~…ĺińßan nu papańßa masadit, sasa nu banuńßan ¶aaj ka mur~…ĺmur~…ĺ ku wajwaj, apuju, pabawan nu banuńßan jadańß ku sasapar~…ĺan numaupuaj, tanaju Ē~ ° ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺu ~s…ôpat a ¶oŇč, kar~…ĺa di ¶…ômdi ¶…ôman, r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu papańßan idaw ku masiŇčaŇčaj a sar~…ĺuar~…ĺusan a adidiaj nu ŇčaŇčip…ônan nu papańßan. bar~…ĺu ńß…ô ¶i nu sasapar~…ĺan mapur~…ĺuŇč mamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, mikabit i t…ôban nu papańßn a nikudan nu r~…ĺir~…ĺisan, maupuaj nu sasapar~…ĺan p…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ °sa, mańßida u buwa Ē~ ° ku wajwaj, sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu butur~…ĺ. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma . u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika
